summary: Alley Boss gathers his companions, Yuri and Mason, to join him in a main scenario quest to defend Briggs. During the surprise attack, Alley Boss showcases his overwhelming power, quickly defeating monsters and gaining the awe of both the NPCs and his peers. As the battle intensifies, he prepares to test the true strength of his newly unlocked third class against a named monster, unaware of the looming threat of the High Black Mage Gorden.
key_moments: Alley Boss recruits Yuri and Mason for a cost-efficient party to tackle the main scenario quest.
The city of Briggs is attacked, triggering a surprise defense event that the group participates in.
Alley Boss demonstrates his superior strength, prompting admiration from bystanders and drawing the attention of the High Black Mage Gorden.
